mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.user_id, a.org_id, a.role_id, b.name AS role_name, b.number AS role_number FROM t_sys_user_role a LEFT JOIN t_sys_role b ON b.id = a.role_id WHERE a.user_id = #{userId} AND a.org_id = #{orgId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO t_sys_user_role (id, user_id, org_id, role_id, create_time, create_user) VALUES
(#{entity.id}, #{entity.userId}, #{entity.orgId}, #{entity.roleId}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.createUser})
